ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date_utc" TEXT /* UTC date and time of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency during the time interval */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency during the time interval */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the cryptocurrency traded during the time interval */,
  "quote_asset_volume" REAL /* Volume of the quote asset traded during the time interval */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed during the time interval */,
  "taker_buy_base_asset" REAL /* Volume of the base asset bought by takers during the time interval */,
  "taker_buy_quote_asset" REAL /* Volume of the quote asset bought by takers during the time interval */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Time interval for which the market data is collected */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain platform used by the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_url" TEXT /* URL of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "supported_cryptocurrencies" TEXT /* List of cryptocurrencies supported by the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_date_utc" TEXT /* UTC date and time of the trade execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "trade_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, trade, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date_utc" TEXT /* UTC date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, download) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., market data, trades, reports) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the order was placed */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the cryptocurrency ordered */,
  "order_date_utc" TEXT /* UTC date and time of the order placement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, filled, canceled) */,
  "order_status_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the order status was last updated */,
  "cancel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for canceling the order (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_book" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order book entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the order */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., bid, ask) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the order book entry */,
  "order_book_type" TEXT /* Type of order book (e.g., bids, asks) */,
  "order_count" INTEGER /* Number of orders in the order book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_book_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_book_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date_utc" TEXT /* UTC date and time the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., trade, report generation, user management) */,
  "activity_date_utc" TEXT /* UTC date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the activity */,
  "related_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related entity (e.g., trade ID, report ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
